institution.name: Robert Morgan Educational Center and Technical College

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Robert Morgan Educational Center and Technical College rose 51% between 2005 and 2008 ($1.6k → $2.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Robert Morgan Educational Center and Technical College fell 50% between 2021 and 2024 (65.6% → 32.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Robert Morgan Educational Center and Technical College rose 50% between 2005 and 2008 ($6.6k → $9.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 15 pp at Robert Morgan Educational Center and Technical College vs the 2002–2006 baseline (33.9% vs 48.9%).
